stemHtml: Which of the following is an adverse effect on an individual’s sleep pattern caused by circadian dysrhythmia jetlag?

options.a: A stronger sleep drive, dependent on the number of time zones crossed.
options.b: Increased sleep inertia, which is more pronounced during westward travel.
options.c: Trying to sleep when a person’s biological rhythm is highly energised.
options.d: An increased probability of suffering from sleep attacks microsleeps.
